name: stray-plugin
description: Repo-local Codex plugin centered on authoring, reviewing, and curating agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plugin workspace for skill authoring, review, search, plugin hygiene, and targeted agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin whose primary job is helping agents create, review, search, refine, and organize Codex skills inside this plugin. It also includes a smaller set of specialist workflow skills that support adjacent agent work such as web research, research-backed ideation, product and MCP design, full-stack app implementation across web, mobile, and desktop surfaces, context compression, eval planning, content distillation, screenshot and GIF production, brand identity design, artifact theming, and practical preflight compliance checks for APIs and repositories, but those are secondary to the skill-authoring and skill-governance workflow.
defaultPrompt: Find existing skills before creating a new one.
Create a new Codex skill in this plugin.
Update an existing skill's trigger description, scope, or workflow.
Review a SKILL.md for trigger quality, overlap risk, and scope clarity.
Audit this plugin's skills for overlap, routing conflicts, or missing coverage.
Clean up a skill so it is narrower, instruction-first, and easier to invoke correctly.
Compare candidate skill patterns and decide whether to adopt, adapt, or create new.
Plan validation cases for a new or updated skill.
Create or update a custom Codex subagent under .codex/agents/ for a specific workflow.
Check the current terms or usage restrictions for an API or SaaS before integrating or shipping it.
Run a practical repository compliance preflight before publishing, open-sourcing, or distributing it.
Build or modify a full-stack app in the current repo, including web, mobile, or desktop user flows, navigation, API integration, auth, and database-backed behavior.
Review a diff, branch, pull request, or staged changes for bugs, regressions, and test gaps.
Write or revise an article with a clear audience, angle, and structure.
Research a current topic on the web and return a concise sourced brief.
Investigate a specialized technical, regulatory, market, or academic topic and return a concise sourced brief.
Generate research-backed ideas or option sets using current web signals before choosing a direction.
Design a product direction or feature brief using current web research.
Compress a long-running task without losing file paths, decisions, or next steps.
Design a multi-agent workflow with clear handoffs and quality gates.
Add AI or agent evals to CI so regressions fail the build.
Triage GitHub maintenance work and recommend the next actions.
Create or edit a JSON Canvas .canvas file safely.
Plan or review an MCP server before implementation.
Capture polished product screenshots for docs or launch assets.
Make a Slack-friendly animated GIF from screenshots or images.
Strip clutter from a web page and return clean markdown.
Apply a coherent visual theme to an existing artifact.
Create or refine a brand identity direction, brand brief, or mini style guide.
